title: Code of Conduct and Workplace Behavior Expectations
text:
Q: What are the expectations for workplace behavior and the code of conduct?
A: Our company expects all employees to uphold a high standard of professionalism and integrity in the workplace. This includes treating colleagues with respect, maintaining a positive work environment, and adhering to all company policies. Harassment, discrimination, or any form of bullying is strictly prohibited and will not be tolerated. Employees are encouraged to report any violations of the code of conduct to their immediate supervisor or the HR department within 24 hours of the incident. We also expect employees to comply with all safety regulations and to act responsibly when representing the company, both on and off-site. Regular training sessions on workplace behavior will be held quarterly to reinforce these expectations. For any questions or concerns regarding the code of conduct, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
